title: potentilla alborzensis
intro: Potentilla alborzensis, also known as the White Potentilla, is a perennial herb belonging to the rose family (Rosaceae). It is a plant native to Iran, which has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Potentilla alborzensis include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made by infusing its flowers and leaves in hot water to create a tea, which is said to have various health benefits when consumed.
